nasb.text: Then Solomon offered burnt offerings to the Lord on the altar of the Lord which he had built before the porch;

esv.text: Then Solomon offered up burnt offerings to the Lord on the altar of the Lord  that he had built before the vestibule,

cnv.text: 那時，所羅門在耶和華的壇上，就是在走廊前面他建築的壇上，向耶和華獻上燔祭，

ccb.text: 所罗门在门廊前他所筑的耶和华的坛上向耶和华献燔祭，
